x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Demand records provide the intake data Now Assist SPM uses for AI-driven prioritization and resource allocation recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure demand management for IT and business demands. Ensure demands have complete descriptions, categories, and business value scores. Target: 50+ active demands.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccb
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Demand records provide the intake data Now Assist SPM uses for AI-driven prioritization and resource allocation recommendations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Demand Management Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('dmn_demand');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' active demand records';

    if (total >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' active demands — sufficient history for Now Assist SPM AI portfolio optimization and resource allocation recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' active demands (target: 50+). Now Assist SPM AI prioritization will have limited portfolio coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' active demands. Now Assist SPM requires sufficient demand history for AI prioritization and resource allocation recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>SPM</module>
<number>CHK0006093</number>
<order>20</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure demand management for IT and business demands. Ensure demands have complete descriptions, categories, and business value scores. Target: 50+ active demands.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>ca03a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccb</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
